mapper.sql: id, diff_date, modelno, warehouse_code, quantity_ops, quantity_wms, quantity_diff, status, msg, create_time, creator, modify_time, modifier
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_inventory_diff
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_inventory_diff (id, diff_date, modelno, warehouse_code, quantity_ops, quantity_wms, quantity_diff, status, msg, create_time, creator, modify_time, modifier) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{diffDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modelno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantityOps,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{quantityWms,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{quantityDiff,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{msg,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR})

insert into dbo.ops_inventory_diff
id,
diff_date,
modelno,
warehouse_code,
quantity_ops,
quantity_wms,
quantity_diff,
status,
msg,
create_time,
creator,
modify_time,
modifier,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{diffDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{modelno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{quantityOps,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{quantityWms,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{quantityDiff,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{msg,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_inventory_diff
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
diff_date = #{record.diffDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity_ops = #{record.quantityOps,jdbcType=INTEGER},
quantity_wms = #{record.quantityWms,jdbcType=INTEGER},
quantity_diff = #{record.quantityDiff,jdbcType=INTEGER},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
msg = #{record.msg,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},

update dbo.ops_inventory_diff set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, diff_date = #{record.diffDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity_ops = #{record.quantityOps,jdbcType=INTEGER}, quantity_wms = #{record.quantityWms,jdbcType=INTEGER}, quantity_diff = #{record.quantityDiff,jdbcType=INTEGER}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, msg = #{record.msg,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}

update dbo.ops_inventory_diff
diff_date = #{diffDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modelno = #{modelno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity_ops = #{quantityOps,jdbcType=INTEGER},
quantity_wms = #{quantityWms,jdbcType=INTEGER},
quantity_diff = #{quantityDiff,jdbcType=INTEGER},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
msg = #{msg,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.ops_inventory_diff set diff_date = #{diffDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modelno = #{modelno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity_ops = #{quantityOps,jdbcType=INTEGER}, quantity_wms = #{quantityWms,jdbcType=INTEGER}, quantity_diff = #{quantityDiff,jdbcType=INTEGER}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, msg = #{msg,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
